requirements.text: WHEN the user opens Settings from the hamburger menu, the system shall display a dedicated Settings modal.
WHEN the Settings modal opens, the system shall display Appearance, Board, and Advanced tabs.
WHEN the user changes a setting, the system shall apply the change immediately without a Save button.
WHEN the user changes Theme in Settings, the system shall persist the selected mode to the existing theme cookie and apply it immediately.
WHEN the user changes Default View in Settings, the system shall persist the preference to browser localStorage.
WHEN the user changes Card Density in Settings, the system shall persist the preference to browser localStorage.
WHEN the user changes Smart Links in Settings, the system shall read and write the existing auto-linking localStorage preference.
WHEN the user configures visible ticket card badges in Settings, the system shall persist the selected badge list to browser localStorage.
WHEN the board renders ticket cards, the system shall show only the configured visible ticket card badges while preserving the standard badge order.
WHEN the user changes Event History in Settings, the system shall show or hide the SSE event history panel using the existing localStorage preference.
WHEN the user clicks Clear Cache in Settings, the system shall run the existing cache clear action.
Settings remain client-side only; no backend API, shared config, CLI, or MCP behavior is introduced.
Browser-only settings use the preference tier defined in docs/architecture/preference-storage-architecture.md.
The visible ticket card badges setting controls board ticket cards only and does not change ticket viewer badges.
Invalid, missing, or unavailable localStorage values fall back to defaults.
WHEN the stored badge list is empty, malformed, or contains unsupported badge IDs, the system shall fall back to the default badge list.

scenarios.title: Settings modal opens
scenarios.given: Given the user is on the app board
scenarios.when: When the user opens Settings from the hamburger menu
scenarios.then: Then the Settings modal appears with Appearance, Board, and Advanced tabs

scenarios.title: Settings apply immediately
scenarios.given: Given the Settings modal is open
scenarios.when: When the user changes a setting
scenarios.then: Then the setting is applied immediately without requiring a Save action

scenarios.title: Appearance preferences persist
scenarios.given: Given the Appearance tab is open
scenarios.when: When the user changes Theme or Default View
scenarios.then: Then the selected preference is persisted in the existing client-side storage

scenarios.title: Board preferences persist
scenarios.given: Given the Board tab is open
scenarios.when: When the user changes Card Density or Smart Links
scenarios.then: Then the selected preference is persisted in browser localStorage

scenarios.title: Visible card badges configured
scenarios.given: Given the Board tab is open
scenarios.when: When the user selects the ticket card badges that should be visible
scenarios.then: Then the board persists the selected list and ticket cards render only those badges in the standard order

scenarios.title: Advanced preferences work
scenarios.given: Given the Advanced tab is open
scenarios.when: When the user toggles Event History or clears cache
scenarios.then: Then the existing event history preference or cache clear action is used

testPlans.title: Visible ticket card badges preference config
Ticket card badge rendering follows visible preference

tasks.title: Add visible ticket card badges preference
